info.title: Forge Fleet HTTP API
info.description: HTTP API for forge-fleet (fleet_server). Bearer auth on /v1 unless listen loopback-only and token unset; workspace-worker routes use X-Workspace-Worker-Token. Narrative handbook: docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md.

bearerAuth.description: FLEET_BEARER_TOKEN; required when bound non-loopback with token set (see FLEET_ENFORCE_BEARER).

workspaceWorkerAuth.name: X-Workspace-Worker-Token
workspaceWorkerAuth.description: Per-job token from job meta (workspace worker bridge).

get.description: Redirect to /admin/. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

200.description: Admin dashboard HTML shell (loads assets under `/admin/ks/`).

get.description: Admin dashboard HTML. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

200.description: Packaged Forge SDLC minimal theme; 404 if kitchensink checkout is missing in dev.

get.description: Legacy theme CSS. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

200.description: Kitchensink CSS or JavaScript under `kitchensink/css/` or `kitchensink/js/`.

404.description: See forge-fleet docs for response body; JSON object.

get.description: Kitchensink static asset. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

404.description: See forge-fleet docs for response body; JSON object.

get.description: Packaged static (e.g. GPU logos). Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

parameters.name: X-Workspace-Archive-Sha256
parameters.description: Optional SHA-256 (hex) of the raw body; mismatch returns 400.

put.description: Upload gzip workspace tarball. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

requestBody.description: Raw bytes of a gzip-compressed tar archive for the job workspace. The server extracts to a host directory before `docker argv` runs. Typical clients send `Content-Type: application/octet-stream`.

200.description: Template package extracted and requirement row upserted.

400.description: See forge-fleet docs for response body; JSON object.

409.description: See forge-fleet docs for response body; JSON object.

401.description: See forge-fleet docs for response body; JSON object.

parameters.name: X-Template-Package-Sha256
parameters.description: Optional SHA-256 (hex) of the raw body; mismatch returns 400.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Template title when creating/updating the requirement row.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes stored on the template row.

parameters.name: replace
parameters.description: When `0`/`false`/`no`, refuse overwrite if template exists. Defaults to replace.

put.description: Upload requirement template tar.gz package. Operator narrative, authentication, and curl patterns: `docs/reference/01-http-api-reference.md`.

requestBody.description: Tar or tar.gz archive containing a Docker build context (Dockerfile at root or under one top-level directory). Typical clients send `Content-Type: application/octet-stream`.
